name: Meatless Bulgur-Filled Tamales
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------FILLING--------------------------
1. In a medium-sized mixing bowl, combine the bulgur, sun-dried tomatoes, onion, and 2 teaspoons salt.
2. Pour in the boiling water and stir until well combined. Cover with a dinner plate and let sit for 15 minutes.
3. Stir in the miso paste and arrowroot powder until thoroughly incorporated.
To cook:
Follow the "Tamales Basic Procedure" recipe instructions for filling and cooking tamales. (See recipe).
Per serving: (2 tamales) 384 calories, 4 grams protein, 420 milligrams sodium, 81 grams carbohydrates, 3 grams fat, 0 cholesterol, 17 milligrams calcium.
From Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993
